notes: Core mechanics are partially implemented but severely broken: frog position uses pixel coords for collision but grid coords for movement causing mismatches, river carrying logic updates frog.x but not frog.gridX so the frog teleports back, home bays only cover left half of screen (5 bays at i*2*CELL but grid is 14 wide), water death triggers every frame in river zone making it nearly unplayable, and vehicle collision uses center-point vs rect which is unreliable.
